text:
contract start and end date pairs and 
identifies the earliest contract start date range continuous with the date range on the record with the 
last-best MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_END_DT. The algorithm starts with the date range on that record and 
works backwards. 

If the APL base variable MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_ADDTNL_PRD_IND equals 1, there are contract dates that 
are not within the date range MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_START_DT to MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_END_DT.
